subcodes.title: Words to assembled guests, spoken on 1913-12-10
subcodes.first_line: Yes, I know every one of you, and I love all of you. I have lived forty years in this city, and so you all are my children.
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
